ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the game took place */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visitor team */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "visitor_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the visiting team */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "attend" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "playoffs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is part of the playoffs */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff, championship) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's coach */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game being attended */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total number of attendees at the game */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated from the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overtime_games" (
  "overtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overtime record */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game that went into overtime */,
  "overtime_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of overtime in minutes */,
  "overtime_points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored during overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overtime_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff record */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the playoff game */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., First Round, Finals) */,
  "matchup" TEXT /* Matchup between teams in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_series" TEXT /* Description of the playoff series */,
  "playoff_year" INTEGER /* Year of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach works for */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "win_percentage" TEXT /* Winning percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the owner owns */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game for which stats are recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom stats are recorded */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
